zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel於1255年出生在英國波克夏素利哈姆時，她的父親Gervais De Pagnel25歲，母親Baroness Isabella de Bellemont21歲。她於1291年與William de Mainwarning在英國爾瓦明加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1308年11月23日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾杜德利享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel于1255年出生在英国波克夏素利哈姆时，她的父亲Gervais De Pagnel25岁，母亲Baroness Isabella de Bellemont21岁。她于1291年与William de Mainwarning在英国爾瓦明加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1308年11月23日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾杜德利享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pagnel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Kurt, Gerhard, Otto, Ewald, Armin, Arno, Fritz, Hermann, Horst, Juergen.
North German: from the personal name Pagel, a Low German form of Paul .
North German (Pägel): metonymic occupational name for a calibrator, from Low German pegel ‘water level gauge, small container’ (see Pegler 3).

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel was born in 1255, in Sulham, Berkshire, England, her father, Gervais De Pagnel, was 25 and her mother, Baroness Isabella de Bellemont, was 21. She married William de Mainwarning in 1291, in Warmingham, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 23 November 1308, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel est née en 1255, à Sulham, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Gervais De Pagnel, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Baroness Isabella de Bellemont, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William de Mainwarning en 1291, à Warmingham, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 23 novembre 1308, à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel 1255 in Sulham, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gervais De Pagnel 25 und ihre Mutter Baroness Isabella de Bellemont 21. Sie hat 1291 in Warmingham, Cheshire, England William de Mainwarning geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 23. November 1308 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel è nata il nel 1255 nel Sulham, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Gervais De Pagnel, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Baroness Isabella de Bellemont, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William de Mainwarning nel 1291, nel Warmingham, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 23 novembre 1308, nel Dudley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnelが1255年にイギリスバークシュアイアスルハムで生まれた時，父Gervais De Pagnelは25歳，母Baroness Isabella de Bellemontは21歳であった。1291年にイギリスチェシュアイアワーミンガムでWilliam de Mainwarningと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1308年11月23日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel(이)가 1255년 영국 버크실르 설함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gervais De Pagnel(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Isabella de Bellemont(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1291년 영국 체실르 워밍함에서 William de Mainwarning(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 11월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel nasceu em 1255, em Sulham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gervais De Pagnel, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Isabella de Bellemont, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Mainwarning em 1291, em Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1308, em Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel родилась в 1255 г. в местности сулхам, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gervais De Pagnel было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Isabella de Bellemont, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Mainwarning в 1291 г. в местности вармингхам, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 23 ноября 1308 г. в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes Lucia de Pagnel nació en 1255, en Sulham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gervais De Pagnel, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Baroness Isabella de Bellemont, tenía 21 años. Se casó con William de Mainwarning en 1291, en Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1308, en Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
